findings.title: Attack surface summary
findings.detail:
groups: open=0, allowlist=0
tools.elevated: enabled
hooks.webhooks: disabled
hooks.internal: disabled
browser control: enabled
trust model: personal assistant (one trusted operator boundary), not hostile multi-tenant on one shared gateway

findings.title: Gateway binds beyond loopback without auth
findings.detail: gateway.bind="auto" resolves to a non-loopback listener but no gateway.auth token/password is configured.
findings.remediation: Set gateway.auth (token recommended) or bind to loopback.

findings.title: Trusted proxies not configured
findings.detail: gateway.bind="auto" is not loopback-equivalent and gateway.trustedProxies is empty. A reverse proxy in front of the Control UI can spoof X-Forwarded-For without explicit trusted proxies.
findings.remediation: Set gateway.trustedProxies to your reverse proxy IP/CIDR(s) or bind to loopback.

findings.title: No auth rate limiting configured
findings.detail: gateway.bind is not loopback but no gateway.auth.rateLimit is configured. Without rate limiting, brute-force auth attacks are not mitigated.
